description: Seed golden test for Property Management Agreement
parsed_text:
PROPERTY MANAGEMENT AGREEMENT
Agreement Date: 2026-10-01
Owner: Harborview Capital Partners LLC
Manager: Summit Property Services Inc.
Property Name: Maple Ridge Office Center
Property Address: 8200 West Park Avenue, Denver, CO 80221
Management Start Date: 2026-10-01
Initial Term End: 2028-09-30
Management Fee: 3.0% of gross collected revenue, payable monthly
Leasing Fee: 4.0% of base rent for new leases and 2.0% for renewals
Authority to Collect Rent: Yes
Bank Account Control: manager to maintain separate operating account in owner's name with monthly reconciliations
Termination Notice: 60 days
Insurance Requirements: commercial general liability; crime coverage; workers compensation; errors and omissions
Reporting Requirements: monthly operating statement; rent roll; delinquency report; annual budget
Governing Law: Colorado
